/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -DNDEBUG  -rdynamic -pthread CMakeFiles/test_roslz4.dir/test/roslz4_test.cpp.o  -o /home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/roslz4/lib/roslz4/test_roslz4   -L/home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/build_isolated/roslz4/gtest  -Wl,-rpath,/home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/build_isolated/roslz4/gtest:/home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/build_isolated/roslz4/gtest/googlemock/gtest:/home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/roslz4/lib:/home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib gtest/googlemock/gtest/libgtest.so /home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/roslz4/lib/libroslz4.so /home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib/libcpp_common.so -lboost_system -lboost_thread -lboost_chrono -lboost_date_time -lboost_atomic /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libconsole_bridge.so.0.4 -pthread -llz4 /home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib/libcpp_common.so -lboost_system -lboost_thread -lboost_chrono -lboost_date_time -lboost_atomic /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libconsole_bridge.so.0.4
